---
title: "External References"
citation: false
---

The following references have been compiled to provide an overview of the data, methods, and guidance associated with the Analytics Engine. These external references offer detailed insights into how datasets were compiled and how methodologies were designed, and form the backbone of the Analytics Engine's climate data tools.

For the latest memorandums on the datasets and methodology behind the Analytics Engine, please visit the [Climate Data and Analysis Working Group (C-DAWG) page](https://www.energy.ca.gov/programs-and-topics/topics/research-and-development/climate-data-and-analysis-working-group-c-dawg).

```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.8/css/dataTables.bootstrap5.min.css">
<style>
  table.dataTable thead th.sorting,
  table.dataTable thead th.sorting_asc,
  table.dataTable thead th.sorting_desc {
    padding-left: 1.5rem;
    padding-right: 0.5rem;
  }
  table.dataTable thead th.sorting:before,
  table.dataTable thead th.sorting:after,
  table.dataTable thead th.sorting_asc:before,
  table.dataTable thead th.sorting_asc:after,
  table.dataTable thead th.sorting_desc:before,
  table.dataTable thead th.sorting_desc:after {
    right: auto;
    left: 0.25rem;
  }
</style>
<script src="https://code.jquery.com/jquery-3.7.1.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.8/js/jquery.dataTables.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.8/js/dataTables.bootstrap5.min.js"></script>

<div class="mb-3">
  <label for="topic-filter" class="form-label fw-semibold">Filter by topic:</label>
  <select id="topic-filter" class="form-select w-auto">
    <option value="">All topics</option>
  </select>
</div>

<table id="references-table" class="table table-striped table-hover" style="width:100%">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th>Topic</th>
      <th>Description</th>
      <th>Date</th>
      <th>Link</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody></tbody>
</table>

<script>
var REFERENCES_DATA = [
  { "topic": "Bias Correction", "date": "2024-05", "date_display": "May 2024", "description": "Comparative study on the impacts of applying a-priori bias correction vs no bias correction to GCMs. Bias correction improves dynamically downscaled climate projections across the western United States.", "citation": "Rahimi, S., Huang, L., Norris, J., Hall, A., Goldenson, N., Risser, M., et al. (2024). Understanding the cascade: Removing GCM biases improves dynamically downscaled climate projections. Geophysical Research Letters, 51, e2023GL106264.", "link": "https://doi.org/10.1029/2023GL106264" },
  { "topic": "Bias Correction", "date": "2024-05", "date_display": "May 2024", "description": "Explanation of when, where, and for which variables a-priori bias correction introduces variance into downscaled projections across the western United States.", "citation": "Risser, M. D., Rahimi, S., Goldenson, N., Hall, A., Lebo, Z. J., & Feldman, D. R. (2024). Is bias correction in dynamical downscaling defensible? Geophysical Research Letters, 51, e2023GL105979.", "link": "https://doi.org/10.1029/2023GL105979" },
  { "topic": "Bias Correction", "date": "2023-12", "date_display": "December 2023", "description": "Methods, QA/QC, and guidance/caveats for the bias correction approaches used for LOCA2-Hybrid and WRF downscaled projections.", "citation": "Pierce, D., S. Rahimi, D. Cayan, J. Kalansky, 2023: Bias Correction in the WRF and LOCA Version 2 Projections. Data Justification Memo for EPC-20-006 Development of Climate Projections for California and Identification of General Use Projections.", "link": "https://www.energy.ca.gov/sites/default/files/2024-03/01_BiasCorrectioninWRF_and_LOCA2Projections_DataJustificationMemo_Pierce_Adopted_ada.pdf" },
  { "topic": "Bias Correction", "date": "2023-12", "date_display": "December 2023", "description": "Methods, QA/QC, and guidance/caveats for the different bias correction approaches (no bias correction, and a-priori bias correction) used for WRF downscaled projections.", "citation": "Rahimi, S., 2023: Dynamically Downscaled Datasets. Data Justification Memo for EPC-20-006 Development of Climate Projections for California and Identification of General Use Projections.", "link": "https://www.energy.ca.gov/sites/default/files/2024-06/02_DynamicalDownscaling_DataJustificationMemo_Rahimi_Adopted_v2May2024_ada.pdf" },
  { "topic": "GCM Selection", "date": "2021-11", "date_display": "November 2021", "description": "Methods, QA/QC, and guidance/caveats regarding the approach to selection and evaluation of CMIP6 GCMs that best capture the characteristics of California's climate.", "citation": "Krantz, W., D. W. Pierce, N. Goldenson, and D. R. Cayan, 2021: Memorandum on Evaluating Global Climate Models for Studying Regional Climate Change in California. Interim deliverable for EPC-020-006, 24 pp.", "link": "https://www.energy.ca.gov/sites/default/files/2022-09/20220907_CDAWG_MemoEvaluating_GCMs_EPC-20-006_Nov2021-ADA.pdf" },
  { "topic": "General Use Projections", "date": "2024-08", "date_display": "August 2024", "description": "Description of criteria, process, selection, and limitations of models for general use projections.", "citation": "Kalansky, J., Yao, P., Pierce D., and Cayan, D. (August 2024). Memorandum on General Use Projects, Memo to California Energy Commission as part of EPC-20-006.", "link": "https://www.energy.ca.gov/sites/default/files/2024-09/a_General_Use_Projections_Selection_Process_sept2024.pdf" },
  { "topic": "General Use Projections", "date": "2023-12", "date_display": "December 2023", "description": "Description of process and selection of models for general use projections. Additional information included on Hourly Sea Level Rise projections and the Cal-Adapt Enterprise.", "citation": "Kalansky, J., et al. (2023, December 6). Meetings and Documents – Climate Data and Analysis Working Group (C-DAWG). California Energy Commission: Energy-Related Environmental Research Energy Research & Development Division.", "link": "https://www.energy.ca.gov/sites/default/files/2023-12/C-DAWG_Presentation_120623_ADA.pdf" },
  { "topic": "Hydrology", "date": "2023-11", "date_display": "November 2023", "description": "Methods, QA/QC, and guidance/caveats for the use of the hydrology projections.", "citation": "Bass, B., 2023: Hydrology Projections. Data Justification Memo for EPC-20-006 Development of Climate Projections for California and Identification of General Use Projections.", "link": "https://www.energy.ca.gov/sites/default/files/2025-04/05_HydrologyProjections_DataJustificationMemo_BassEtAl_Adopted_v3_ada.pdf" },
  { "topic": "Hydrology", "date": "2023-02", "date_display": "February 2023", "description": "Calibration approach used for regionalization of hydrology parameters (study covers its application on the 9 km grid, but the same approach was used for the 3km grid for Noah-MP, VIC).", "citation": "Bass, B., S. Rahimi, N. Goldenson, A. Hall, J. Norris, and Z. J. Lebow, 2023: Achieving Realistic Runoff in the Western United States with a Land Surface Model Forced by Dynamically Downscaled Meteorology. J. Hydrometeor., 24, 269–283.", "link": "https://doi.org/10.1175/JHM-D-22-0047.1" },
  { "topic": "LOCA2-Hybrid", "date": "2023-12", "date_display": "December 2023", "description": "Methods, QA/QC, and guidance/caveats for the use of the LOCA2-Hybrid downscaling products.", "citation": "Pierce, D. W., D. R. Cayan, S. Rahimi, and J. Kalansky, 2023: LOCA version 2 Hybrid Downscaling. Data Justification Memo for EPC-20-006 Development of Climate Projections for California and Identification of General Use Projections.", "link": "https://www.energy.ca.gov/sites/default/files/2024-03/04_HybridDownscaling_DataJustificationMemo_Pierce_Adopted_ada.pdf" },
  { "topic": "LOCA2-Hybrid", "date": "2023-12", "date_display": "December 2023", "description": "Methods, QA/QC, and guidance/caveats for the development of the LOCA2 training data.", "citation": "Pierce, D. W., S. Rahimi, D. R. Cayan, and J. Kalansky, 2023: Bias Correction in the WRF and LOCA2 Projections. Data Justification Memo for EPC-20-006 Development of Climate Projections for California and Identification of General Use Projections.", "link": "https://www.energy.ca.gov/sites/default/files/2024-03/03_LOCA2-forCA-TrainingData_DataJustificationMemo_Pierce_Adopted_ada.pdf" },
  { "topic": "LOCA2-Hybrid", "date": "2023-05", "date_display": "May 2023", "description": "Development and availability of LOCA2 projections (with ensemble bias correction).", "citation": "Pierce, D. W., D. R. Cayan, D. R. Feldman, and M. D. Risser, 2023: Future Increases in North American Extreme Precipitation in CMIP6 Downscaled with LOCA. J. Hydrometeor, 24, 951–975.", "link": "https://doi.org/10.1175/JHM-D-22-0194.1" },
  { "topic": "Sea Level", "date": "2023-11", "date_display": "November 2023", "description": "Methods, QA/QC, and guidance/caveats for the development of the hourly sea level rise projections.", "citation": "Cayan, D., S. Iacobellis, J. Kalansky, 2023: Hourly Sea Level Projections from CMIP6 Climate and Weather. Data Justification Memo for EPC-20-006 Development of Climate Projections for California and Identification of General Use Projections.", "link": "https://www.energy.ca.gov/sites/default/files/2024-09/06_HourlySeaLevelProjections_DataJustificationMemo_Iacobellis_Adopted_v2_ada.pdf" },
  { "topic": "Sea Level", "date": "2008-01", "date_display": "January 2008", "description": "Hourly sea level rise projections – modeling technique.", "citation": "Cayan, D.R., Bromirski, P.D., Hayhoe, K. et al. Climate change projections of sea level extremes along the California coast. Climatic Change 87 (Suppl 1), 57–73 (2008).", "link": "https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s10584-007-9376-7" },
  { "topic": "WRF", "date": "2024-05", "date_display": "May 2024", "description": "Recommendations for use of specific, dynamically downscaled models (with a-priori bias correction). Also includes information on LOCA2-Hybrid downscaling and targeted case studies for extreme events.", "citation": "Kalansky, J., et al. (2024, May 17). Meetings and Documents – Climate Data and Analysis Working Group (C-DAWG). California Energy Commission: Energy-Related Environmental Research Energy Research & Development Division.", "link": "https://www.energy.ca.gov/sites/default/files/2022-12/3_ERA_Analytics_Engine_CDAWG_ADA.pptx" },
  { "topic": "WRF", "date": "2024-03", "date_display": "March 2024", "description": "Dynamical downscaling evaluation – results from 16 dynamically downscaled CMIP6 simulations over the Western United States (WUS-D3), including the whole of the Western Electricity Coordinating Council (WECC) region.", "citation": "Rahimi, S., Huang, L., Norris, J., Hall, A., Goldenson, N., Krantz, W., Bass, B., et al. An overview of the Western United States Dynamically Downscaled Dataset (WUS-D3), Geosci. Model Dev., 17, 2265–2286, 2024.", "link": "https://gmd.copernicus.org/articles/17/2265/2024/" },
  { "topic": "WRF", "date": "2022-10", "date_display": "October 2022", "description": "Dynamical downscaling evaluation – evaluation of the performance of four dynamically downscaled projections using WRF (no bias correction).", "citation": "Rahimi-Esfarjan, S., 2022: Memorandum on the evaluation of downscaled GCM using WRF (deliverable for EPC-20-006). Memo for EPC-20-006 Development of Climate Projections for California and Identification of General Use Projections.", "link": "https://cal-adapt.org/files/01_Memo_Evaluation_of_Downscaled_GCMs_Using_WRF_CEC_final.pdf" },
  { "topic": "WRF", "date": "2022-04", "date_display": "April 2022", "description": "Dynamical downscaling technique – development and availability of four dynamically downscaled projections using WRF (no bias correction).", "citation": "Rahimi-Esfarjan, S., 2022: Memorandum on the development and availability of dynamically downscaled projections using WRF. Memo for EPC-20-006 Development of Climate Projections for California and Identification of General Use Projections.", "link": "https://www.energy.ca.gov/sites/default/files/2022-09/20220907_CDAWG_MemoDynamicalDownscaling_EPC-20-006_May2022-ADA.pdf" },
  { "topic": "WRF", "date": "2022-01", "date_display": "January 2022", "description": "Dynamical downscaling evaluation – method and results from dynamical downscaling of the historical record across the Western United States using ERA5.", "citation": "Rahimi, S., Krantz, W., Lin, Y.-H., Bass, B., Goldenson, N., Hall, A., et al. (2022). Evaluation of a reanalysis-driven configuration of WRF4 over the western United States from 1980 to 2020. Journal of Geophysical Research: Atmospheres, 127, e2021JD035699.", "link": "https://agupubs.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/full/10.1029/2021JD035699" },
  { "topic": "Adaptation Planning", "date": "2024-08", "date_display": "August 2024", "description": "Guidance on how to incorporate the best available information on climate variability and change into emergency management planning.", "citation": "Albano, C., McCarthy, M., McAfee, S., Wein, A., Dettinger, M. Incorporating Climate Data into Emergency Planning and Exercises – A Primer for Emergency Management Practitioners and Data Developers. August 2024. Prepared by the Desert Research Institution and the U.S. Geological Survey for the California Department of Water Resources.", "link": "https://s3-us-west-2.amazonaws.com/webfiles.dri.edu/Projects/ARkStormTahoe2/Albanoetal2024_DRITechReport41303v2.pdf" },
  { "topic": "Adaptation Planning", "date": "2024-01", "date_display": "2024", "description": "Guide to the selection of suitable climate data for physical climate risk assessment. Includes a brief review of the climate modeling science and statistics used in climate science, as well as specific descriptions of sources of past and future data.", "citation": "Electric Power Research Institute (EPRI). Climate Data Users Guide. EPRI, Palo Alto, CA: 2024. 3002028078.", "link": "https://apps.epri.com/climate-data-user-guide/en/" },
  { "topic": "Adaptation Planning", "date": "2023-03", "date_display": "2023", "description": "A high-level, federal guide for selecting resources (data, tools, reports, case studies, etc.) for understanding climate vulnerabilities. Focuses on exposure to climate-related hazards and their potential impacts.", "citation": "OSTP (2023). Selecting Climate Information to Use in Climate Risk and Impact Assessments: Guide for Federal Agency Climate Adaptation Planners. White House Office of Science and Technology Policy. Washington, D.C.", "link": "https://bidenwhitehouse.archives.gov/wp-content/uploads/2023/03/Guide-on-Selecting-Climate-Information-to-Use-in-Climate-Risk-and-Impact-Assessments.pdf" },
  { "topic": "Adaptation Planning", "date": "2023-01", "date_display": "2023", "description": "The U.S. Government's report on climate change impacts, risks, and responses. Provides the scientific foundation to support informed decision-making across the U.S.", "citation": "U.S. Global Change Research Program (USGCRP). Fifth National Climate Assessment. 2023.", "link": "https://globalchange.gov/our-work/fifth-national-climate-assessment" },
  { "topic": "Adaptation Planning", "date": "2023-01", "date_display": "2021–2023", "description": "Comprehensive report developed as part of the United Nations to assess the science related to climate change and provide the scientific basis for governments to develop climate related policies.", "citation": "Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change (IPCC). Sixth Assessment Report. 2021–2023.", "link": "https://www.ipcc.ch/assessment-report/ar6/" },
  { "topic": "Adaptation Planning", "date": "2022-01", "date_display": "2022", "description": "Online guide collating various climate data portals and resources. Helps users effectively identify, acquire, and interpret climate change information appropriate for their specific context.", "citation": "Vano, JA and JJ Lukas. (2022). A User Guide to Climate Change Portals. Prepared by the Aspen Global Change Institute.", "link": "https://www.agci.org/projects/climate-portal-guide" },
  { "topic": "Adaptation Planning", "date": "2022-01", "date_display": "2022", "description": "Guidance on how to consider different methods for vulnerability and risk assessment, decision making, measuring and evaluating project components, and reporting on adaptation planning and implementation.", "citation": "Gardiner, N., ed., Hutchins, M., Fox, J., Patel, A., and Rhodes, K. Implementing the Steps to Resilience: a Practitioner's Guide. Climate-Smart Communities Series, Vol. 6. NOAA Climate Program Office, 2022.", "link": "https://repository.library.noaa.gov/view/noaa/46456" },
  { "topic": "Adaptation Planning", "date": "2021-01", "date_display": "2021", "description": "A compilation of resources from the U.S. federal government for planning and deploying climate adaptation and resilience-building efforts at state and local levels.", "citation": "U.S. Global Change Research Program (USGCRP) and the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA) Climate Program Office. U.S. Climate Resilience Toolkit.", "link": "https://toolkit.climate.gov/" },
  { "topic": "Adaptation Planning", "date": "2021-01", "date_display": "2021", "description": "Guidance on how to select, apply, and interpret downscaled climate information for use in planning.", "citation": "Kotamarthi R, Hayhoe K, Mearns LO, Wuebbles D, Jacobs J, Jurado J. Guidance and Recommendations for Use of (Downscaled) Climate Information. In: Downscaling Techniques for High-Resolution Climate Projections: From Global Change to Local Impacts. Cambridge University Press; 2021:139-156.", "link": "https://www-cambridge-org.libproxy.berkeley.edu/core/books/downscaling-techniques-for-highresolution-climate-projections/guidance-and-recommendations-for-use-of-downscaled-climate-information/E7858E9C5DA85065DD463EE5052EA2E6" },
  { "topic": "Adaptation Planning", "date": "2020-01", "date_display": "2020", "description": "Guidance on local adaptation and resilience planning in California. Includes a summary of statewide guidance, resources and tools, as well as links to federal resources.", "citation": "The California Governor's Office of Planning and Research. California Adaptation Planning Guide. Developed in response to Senate Bill 246.", "link": "https://resilientca.org/apg/" },
  { "topic": "Adaptation Planning", "date": "2018-01", "date_display": "2018", "description": "Highlights better practices for incorporating climate change information within planning and management. Includes strategies, guidelines, and frequently asked questions.", "citation": "Vano, J. A., Arnold, J. R., Nijssen, B., Clark, M. P., Wood, A. W., Gutmann, E. D., Addor, N., Hamman, J., & Lehner, F. DOs and DON'Ts for using climate change information for water resource planning and management: guidelines for study design. Climate Services, 12, 1–13, 2018.", "link": "https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S2405880717301176" },
  { "topic": "Adaptation Planning", "date": "2018-01", "date_display": "2018", "description": "Guidance on climate risks and how to consider them in planning and investment.", "citation": "The California Governor's Office of Planning and Research. Planning and Investing for a Resilient California: A Guidebook for State Agencies. Developed by the Technical Advisory Group (TAG), formed under EO B-30-15. 2018.", "link": "http://opr.ca.gov/docs/20180313-Building_a_Resilient_CA.pdf" }
];

$(document).ready(function () {
  (function (data) {

      // Populate topic dropdown
      var topics = [...new Set(data.map(function (d) { return d.topic; }))].sort();
      var select = document.getElementById('topic-filter');
      topics.forEach(function (t) {
        var opt = document.createElement('option');
        opt.value = t;
        opt.textContent = t;
        select.appendChild(opt);
      });

      // Initialize DataTable
      var table = $('#references-table').DataTable({
        data: data,
        columns: [
          {
            data: 'topic',
            width: '14%'
          },
          {
            data: 'description',
            width: '56%',
            orderable: false,
            render: function (data, type, row) {
              if (type === 'display') {
                return '<div>' + data + '</div>'
                  + '<small class="text-muted">' + row.citation + '</small>';
              }
              return data + ' ' + row.citation;
            }
          },
          {
            data: 'date',
            width: '12%',
            render: function (data, type, row) {
              return type === 'display' ? row.date_display : data;
            }
          },
          {
            data: 'link',
            width: '10%',
            orderable: false,
            render: function (data) {
              return '<a href="' + data + '" target="_blank" '
                + 'class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary">View</a>';
            }
          }
        ],
        order: [[2, 'desc']],
        pageLength: 25,
        language: {
          search: 'Search:'
        }
      });

      // Wire up topic filter
      document.getElementById('topic-filter').addEventListener('change', function () {
        table.column(0).search(this.value).draw();
      });
  })(REFERENCES_DATA);
});
</script>
```
